name: ui-mockup
description: Create and edit UI Mockup/Wireframe from System Design Document — supports ASCII wireframes, HTML mockups with Web Component master page, component specifications, design tokens, CLAUDE.md-aware alert library (SweetAlert2 default), field mapping, framework-aware URL syntax, validation and quality checks, /help command with mode-based guide (--quick/--workflow/--integration/--html/--ascii/--parallel), integrated with system-design-doc, frontend-design, and brain skills
